title: Server Guided Ad Insertion (SGAI)
description: Use SGAI to create next generation ad experiences
long_description: Deliver more personalized and targeted ads with SGAI. Reduce infrastructure costs in your ad workflow and improve ad selection with SGAI. Enable new advertising experiences by combining SGAI with new user experiences to show double-box, picture-in-picture or L-shape ads.

metadata.title: Server Guided Ad Insertion » Demo | Bitmovin
metadata.description: Experience Bitmovin's HTML5 VR and 360 adaptive video player in this interactive demo
